testcase.name: testTokenExistsAfterLogin

failure.message: Token should exist in localStorage after login! expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Token should exist in localStorage after login! expected [false] but found [true] at com.ecommerce.tests.LogoutTest.testTokenExistsAfterLogin(LogoutTest.java:40) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 33 stack frames

testcase.name: testLogoutClearsSession

failure.message: Token should be cleared from localStorage after logout! expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Token should be cleared from localStorage after logout! expected [true] but found [false] at com.ecommerce.tests.LogoutTest.testLogoutClearsSession(LogoutTest.java:96) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 33 stack frames

testcase.name: testLogoutRedirectsToLogin

failure.message: Should redirect to login/register after logout! expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Should redirect to login/register after logout! expected [true] but found [false] at com.ecommerce.tests.LogoutTest.testLogoutRedirectsToLogin(LogoutTest.java:123) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 33 stack frames
